name: FeatureCardThree
description: Adaptive feature section with hover-reveal cards displaying numbered features with images.
details: Use for interactive feature showcases with hover effects. Each card displays a numbered ID badge that flips to an info icon on hover, image background, title, and description that reveals with a slide-up background animation. Automatically switches between grid (1-4 items) and carousel (5+ items). Carousel offers auto-scroll or button controls (recommended: keep default buttons for better UX). Optional header with title, description, tag, and buttons. Header supports centered or split textbox layout (split: tag + title + description left, buttons right; split-actions: tag + title left, buttons only right; split-description: tag + title left, description only right).

description.example: Get detailed insights into your business performance

imageSrc.note: Supports external URLs with unoptimized prop

imageAlt.note: Empty string marks image as decorative (aria-hidden)

propsSchema.features: Array<{ id: string, title: string, description: string, imageSrc: string, imageAlt?: string }>
propsSchema.animationType: 'none' | 'opacity' | 'slide-up' | 'scale-rotate' | 'blur-reveal' (required - controls GSAP scroll animations with stagger effect)
propsSchema.title: string
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>
propsSchema.textboxLayout: 'default' | 'split' | 'split-actions' | 'split-description' | 'inline-image' (required - 'inline-image' uses titleSegments for rich text with images)
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageWrapperClassName?: string - For styling image wrapper in inline-image layout
propsSchema.textBoxTitleImageClassName?: string - For styling images in inline-image layout

usageExample: <FeatureCardThree features={[{ id: '01', title: 'Analytics', description: 'Track performance with detailed insights', imageSrc: '/feature.jpg' }]} title="Our Features" description="Discover what makes us different" textboxLayout="default" animationType="slide-up" useInvertedBackground={false} />
